name: mediatwist-automation-engine
description: Remotion video compositions + render pipeline for Mediatwist social posts

scripts.render:feed: npx remotion render src/index.ts FeedPost out/feed-post.mp4 --codec h264
scripts.render:reels: npx remotion render src/index.ts ReelsPost out/reels-post.mp4 --codec h264
scripts.render:caption: npx remotion render src/index.ts BrandedCaption out/caption-post.mp4 --codec h264
scripts.render:all: npm run render:feed && npm run render:reels && npm run render:caption
